name: MSI MPG 274URDFW E16M 27" Rapid IPS with Mini-LED Gaming Monitor - Dual Mode with UHD 160Hz and FHD 320Hz - VESA DisplayHDR 1000 - 0.5ms GtG - G-SYNC Compatible - FreeSync Premium - 2x HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4a - USB Type-C (DP Alt) (MPG274URDFWE16M)

description: 27-inch premium gaming monitor with mini-LED display supporting dual mode (UHD/160Hz and FHD/320Hz) for high-refresh competitive gaming.

specs.features: VESA DisplayHDR 1000, G-SYNC Compatible, FreeSync Premium, HDMI 2.1
